dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires candlestick pattern recognition (lowest third position) which cannot be precisely expressed with allowed indicators. Translated core logic as: price crossing above and staying above sma_50. Exit condition inferred as reversal below sma_50 since AUTHOR_SILENT. Stop loss set to average decline percentage (4.88%) from parameters. Hold period set to 20 days as reasonable intermediate timeframe for breakout trades. Entry conditions combined with AND logic: must cross above AND remain above sma_50 to confirm breakout.

source_rule_text: Candlestick pattern with moving average confirmation: breakouts above the 50-trading-day moving average
